statements.impact_statement: The project does not import google.golang.org/grpc/authz and does not use authorization policy evaluation paths affected by the advisory.
evidence: Search for 'google.golang.org/grpc/authz|authz' in services/ returned no matches.

statements.impact_statement: NLTK is not imported by the project code and is present only as an inactive transitive dependency of the DeepPavlov-based image.
evidence: Search for 'import nltk' and 'from nltk' in services/ returned no matches.

statements.impact_statement: Entity extraction models are baked into the image during build and the service does not accept user-supplied checkpoint files at runtime.
evidence: DeepPavlov model installation and download are executed in the Docker build stage.
The service exposes HTTP endpoints for entity extraction, but no endpoint for uploading model files.

statements.impact_statement: The vulnerable model deserialization path is limited to trusted image-baked artifacts; runtime uploads of model files are not supported in this service.
evidence: DeepPavlov model installation and download are executed in the Docker build stage.
The service exposes HTTP endpoints for entity extraction, but no endpoint for uploading model files.
